title: DW-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs on Data Warehouse Graph Topology Reasoning
description: DW-Bench is a benchmark suite for evaluating large language models on graph topology reasoning tasks over data warehouse schemas. It contains 1,046 questions across 5 real-world and synthetic datasets (AdventureWorks, TPC-DS, TPC-DI, OMOP CDM, Syn-Logistics), organized into 13 subtypes spanning lineage tracing, FK routing, and silo detection. Each dataset includes original and obfuscated schema variants. The benchmark includes per-question evaluation results for 3 frontier LLMs (Gemini 2.5 Flash, DeepSeek-V3, Qwen2.5-72B) across 6 baselines (Flat Text, Vector-RAG, Graph-Augmented, Tool-Use, ReAct-Code, Oracle). All schema graphs are provided as PyTorch Geometric HeteroData objects.

creators.name: Sakar, C. Okan
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Engineering, Bahçeşehir University

notes: This dataset accompanies the paper 'DW-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs on Data Warehouse Graph Topology Reasoning' submitted to NeurIPS 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks Track. The arXiv identifier will be updated once the preprint is announced.
